purpose: Joins every L1 dry-run input — replacement_levels, standalone artifact forge, CRT/TLS/atexit direct-link proofs, real-program smoke, dlfcn replace-boundary sentinel + L1 burndown, perf baselines + waiver audit, runtime evidence replay — into a single dashboard with pass/blocker rows. The dashboard never promotes current_level automatically; it surfaces the next blocker set with exact artifact refs and source_commit, and fails closed on stale, missing, or contradictory inputs.

rows.rationale: A successful forge row is evidence only; it must never promote replacement level by itself.
LD_PRELOAD/interpose artifacts cannot substitute for standalone replacement evidence.

rows.expected_value: L1 claim promotion remains blocked until current_level and release_tag_policy.current_release_level move from L0 to L1 together under the bd-gtf.4 objective gate.
rows.rationale: The dashboard must expose the primary L1 blocker as a concrete row.

rows.expected_value: Complete the L1 CRT/startup/TLS proof matrix for startup, TLS, init/fini, destructors, errno isolation, secure mode, and diagnostics
rows.rationale: The dashboard must expose the transition requirement that remains tied to the CRT/startup/TLS blocker.
